description: The image displays the corporate logo for "TRE ALTAMIRA". The logo features an abstract graphic above the company name. The graphic consists of multiple curved elements in shades of blue, resembling a stylized wave or sail, with small arcs suggesting signals or waves at the top left. Below the graphic, the name "TRE" is written in large, bold, blue capital letters. Underneath, "ALTAMIRA" is written in slightly smaller, blue capital letters. Finally, "A CLS Group Company" is written in smaller, light blue capital letters below "ALTAMIRA".
